title: Barriers in Implementation of Sanitation Projects: A Case Study of Open Defecation Free (ODF) India

summary.about: Why rural households may not use toilets even when sanitation infrastructure is available.
summary.audience: Sanitation agencies, rural-development officials and public-health organizations.
summary.method: Uses household survey evidence from Bhikarirampur village in Uttar Pradesh.
summary.insights: Infrastructure alone is insufficient; implementation must address behavioral, social, privacy and access barriers, especially for women.
